  • weekly picks (Jul 3 week 2026)

  • A WordCloud of 2026 July 3rd week collection

    ===Qwen & Hermes’ pick===

    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score :
    Unfold/Fold

    07/20

    1. s42005-026-02752-y Pairing induced phase transition in the non reciprocal Kitaev chain (Communications Physics)

    2. 2607.15301v1 Thermo-elastic properties of hydrated epoxy-graphene nanocomposites from ensemble-based molecular dynamics simulations (arXiv)

    3. 2607.15332v1 Spontaneous Nanopatterning and Strain Relaxation in SiGe Layers Grown by Oxidative Solid Phase Epitaxy (arXiv)

    4. 2607.15333v1 Nanoscale stray fields from micromagnets for optimal spin qubit architecture (arXiv)

    5. 2607.15346v1 Field-induced first order transitions and phase coexistence in the Kitaev quantum spin liquid candidate BaCo2(AsO4)2 (arXiv)

    6. 2607.15353v1 Dynamical Polarization from Hidden Spin and Orbital Textures in p-Wave Magnets (arXiv)

    7. 2607.15387v1 Phase-Field Simulation of Dendrite Evolution in All-Solid-State Sodium Batteries during Cycling (arXiv)

    8. 2607.15411v1 Ab initio time-dependent GW approach for nonequilibrium exciton-phonon coupled dynamics across momentum space (arXiv)

    9. 2607.15458v1 Data-efficient reconstruction of critical quantum dynamics via blind fractional-envelope extrapolation (arXiv)

    10. 2607.15476v1 exa-PD: A scalable high-performance workflow for multi-element phase diagram construction (arXiv)

    11. 2607.15514v1 Exploring the Potential of BY3 (Y = P, As) Monolayers as High-Capacity and Rapid-Diffusion Anodes for Sodium-Ion Batteries (arXiv)

    12. 2607.15538v1 Terahertz Time-Domain Spectroscopy as a Universal Defect Fingerprinting Tool for Organic Halide Perovskite Solar Cells (arXiv)

    13. 2607.15578v1 Hot-Carrier Distribution Spectroscopy by Transconductance in Two-Dimensional Field-Effect Transistors (arXiv)

    14. 2607.15580v1 Symmetry-Enforced Dirac Fermions and Structural Metastability in Pentagonal Monolayers of Transition-Metal Ditellurides (arXiv)

    15. 2607.15581v1 General and scalable vapor etching and transformation platform for two-dimensional materials (arXiv)

    16. 2607.15611v1 Topology and compact molecular orbitals in twisted bilayer WSe$_2$ (arXiv)

    17. 2607.15616v1 Isothermal compression of a Fermi gas to deep quantum degeneracy (arXiv)

    18. 2607.15665v1 Long range spatial correlations in the periodically driven transverse field Ising model (arXiv)

    19. 2607.15675v1 Strong intervalley mixing between copropagating quantum Hall edge channels in a silicon MOSFET (arXiv)

    20. 2607.15676v1 Absence of Spin-Glass Order on Migdal–Kadanoff Hierarchical Lattices near Three Dimensions (arXiv)

    21. 2607.15703v1 How Topology Shapes the Phase Behavior of Polyelectrolytes (arXiv)

    22. 2607.15706v1 Bifurcation reordering programs snap-through symmetry in folded elastic ribbons (arXiv)

    23. 2607.15720v1 First-Order Topological FFLO Transition and Superconducting Diode Sign Reversal in Altermagnetic Nanowires (arXiv)

    24. 2607.15722v1 Drift-Induced Nonreciprocal Hyperbolic Polaritons in Graphene/$\alpha$-MoO$_3$ Heterostructures (arXiv)

    25. 2607.15748v1 Two-step growth of (In,Ga)N pseudo-substrates on GaN templates by plasma-assisted molecular beam epitaxy (arXiv)

    26. 2607.15757v1 Contactless terahertz mapping of wafer-scale superconducting NbTiN thin films (arXiv)

    27. 2607.15763v1 Machine-learning test of the single-ion model for $dd$ excitations in cuprates (arXiv)

    28. 2607.15767v1 Controlling charge and spin currents through nonreciprocal dissipative processes (arXiv)

    29. 2607.15777v1 Reversible and irreversible dynamical topological transitions of magnetic Hopfions (arXiv)

    30. 2607.15785v1 A Flickering Resonance Degeneracy on Entropy-Ruled Charge Transport in the Extended Hopping Sites for Biological Systems: Role of Static-to-Dynamic Disorder Transition (arXiv)

    31. 2607.15786v1 Fermion parity of an Andreev molecule probed by nonlocal Josephson effect (arXiv)

    32. 2607.15798v1 Quantum and classical entropic complexity of the thermal state: coherence, decoherence, and the ergodic-to-localized crossover in random-matrix and many-body models (arXiv)

    33. 2607.15813v1 Thermal Order by Disorder in Resonating-Valence Bond States on the Checkerboard Lattice (arXiv)

    34. 2607.15844v1 Electrothermal control of spin-reorientation transition in Co/Fe_3GaTe_2 heterostructures (arXiv)

    35. 2607.15902v1 Ultrametric organization of energy landscapes on random Erd\H{o}s–R'enyi graphs: topological origin of barrier hierarchy (arXiv)

    36. 2607.15911v1 Zigzag ordering, defects, and anomalous relaxation in antiferromagnetic Kuramoto lattices (arXiv)

    37. 2607.15946v1 Disentangling topological and anomalous Hall contributions of skyrmions using Kerr microscopy and thermal transport measurements (arXiv)

    38. 2607.15990v1 Phase-controlled quasi-bound states in the continuum and thermoelectric enhancement in Majorana-quantum-dot nanostructures (arXiv)

    39. 2607.15993v1 Qubit encodings in the p-orbital-valley spectrum for enhanced coherence and tunable two-qubit interaction (arXiv)

    40. 2607.15996v1 Drosophila of phonon-mediated superconductivity: Full Eliashberg theory of the jellium model (arXiv)

    41. 2607.16011v1 Negative quantum friction in nanoscale water flows: the Wigner picture (arXiv)

    42. 2607.16023v1 Magnons reveal topology and dynamics of a skyrmion crystal (arXiv)

    43. 2607.16039v1 Deconfined quantum critical point in a dissipative spin-1/2 chain (arXiv)

    44. 2607.16055v1 Coherent driving of displacive Higgs fluctuations in superconductors (arXiv)

    45. 2607.16142v1 Excitonic structure in CsPbBr$_3$ nanocubes, nanorods and nanoplatelets: the effect of dimensionality (arXiv)

    46. 2607.16150v1 Quantum Fisher information of magnetic quantum phase transition on Kondo lattice (arXiv)

    47. 2607.16167v1 Atomistic mechanism of corrosion-induced grain boundary migration in NiCr alloys in molten FLiNaK (arXiv)

    48. 2607.16180v1 A Dynamical Phase-Field Model for the Optical Properties of Ferroelectrics (arXiv)

    49. 2607.16186v1 Nonequilibrium thermodynamics of feedback-control: a phase-space perspective (arXiv)

    50. 2607.15343v1 Non-Hermitian Quantum Adiabatic Algorithm (arXiv)

    51. 2607.15497v1 A Mesoscopic Ginzburg–Landau Model for Vibrational Strong Coupling Enhanced Rayleigh Scattering in Molecular Liquids (arXiv)

    52. 2607.15526v1 Enhanced Third-Harmonic Generation in Diamond Photonic Crystal Slabs via Doubly Resonant Quasi-Bound States in the Continuum (arXiv)

    53. 2607.15622v1 Near-field Dressing of Thermal Emission (arXiv)

    54. 2607.15649v1 Fate of dynamical quantum phase transitions from sudden quench to slow quench limit (arXiv)

    55. 2607.15700v1 Growth of quartet correlations in neutron-rich Tellurium isotopes within quartet Bardeen-Cooper-Schrieffer theory (arXiv)

    56. 2607.15909v1 Reconstruction of the noise correlation spectral density from the cavity emission in a two-qubit system (arXiv)

    57. 2607.15925v1 Sub-microsecond conformational dynamics in an optical nanocavity (arXiv)

    58. 2607.16099v1 Symmetry extension by condensation defects II: general dimensions and higher-groups (arXiv)

    59. 2607.16116v1 Quantum-classical crossover in fault-tolerant quantum dynamics simulation (arXiv)
